response.justification: Bogdan brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience, with recent, directly relevant work in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, plus hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at his current role — a rare and explicitly required skill. His testing pedigree is exceptional (TDD practitioner, author of test frameworks, testing course instructor), and he has practical cloud, Docker, and Kubernetes experience. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience and a frontend history weighted more toward Ember than React, but his demonstrated polyglot adaptability makes these low-risk.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work and AI-agent/MCP infrastructure development
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, and taught testing courses
Proven polyglot (TypeScript, Java, C++, D, PHP, Swift) with cloud and container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, which is core to the primary stack
No Kotlin, and Java experience appears dated and limited to earlier roles
Frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js; React depth is limited to one recent role

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary stack
